_comment: FRAGMENT — install.sh DEEP-MERGES this SessionStart entry into a repo's .codex/hooks.json; it is NOT a full hooks file and must never clobber an existing hook (e.g. a foreign SessionStart entry is preserved; this entry is appended alongside it). The command is repo-relative (resolved from the repo root at run time), never absolute. It runs a bounded probe that touches nothing and can never fail the session (|| true, short timeout). The _ccl marker tags this entry for selective uninstall.
